trait.confidence_notes: GWAS is sex-combined; dosage-compensation assumptions are not explicit.
trait.category: Biological samples > Assay results > Blood assays > Blood count
trait.description_more: Result of "Monocytes Percentage" assay, performed on blood sample, obtained from UK Biobank assessment centre visit. Monocytes (percentage) is calculated as the proportion of monocytes in the leukocytes.
